company.what_they_do: Unknown. The website is a default, unconfigured WordPress installation with no real content — only placeholder/lorem ipsum text and the default 'Hello World' first post. No products, services, or business description are published.
company.raw_notes: Site content is entirely WordPress boilerplate: 'Hello world!', 'Welcome to WordPress. This is your first post. Edit or delete it, then start writing!' and lorem ipsum filler text. No about page, no services page, no team info, no branding beyond the domain name. The org name 'Natan IT Solutions' suggests an IT services or solutions company, but this is inference from the name alone — nothing on the site confirms it.

individual.name: Natan
individual.notes: First name 'Natan' matches the company name 'Natan IT Solutions', suggesting this individual may be the founder or owner. Email prefix is 'hr@', which typically indicates a Human Resources role or function — creating a tension: either Natan is the founder/owner who also handles HR, or 'hr@' is a generic departmental address used by a non-founder. No individual profile, title, LinkedIn, or bio was found on the website. No further identifying information available from first-party sources.
